PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-04-2024 Continued To Mar-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Emilie Calhoun appeared in person for Lindsay Morris Bryan (objector).
Negin Rashidi appeared via zoom for Tree Tam (petitioner).

Ms. Calhoun stated that they conducted discovery and depositions, that mediation has not taken place yet, that are open to Pro Bono Mediation. Ms. Rashidi agrees to Pro Bono Mediation.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than March 7, 2025. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by March 11, 2025. The matter is continued and the Parties are to return on March 17, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Santos. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Will Contest
Off Calendar Nov-04-2024 Continued To Mar-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-19-2024 Continued To Nov-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-19-2024 Continued To Nov-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Negin Rashidi appeared by zoom for Tree Tam (petitioner).
Emilie Calhoun appeared by zoom for and with Lindsay Bryan (objector).

The court disclosed that Robert Hernandez, a former associate of Emilie Calhoun, is now working here as a staff attorney for a six-month temporary position and that he has been walled off of any cases involving Mrs. Calhoun's cases. Discussion was held regarding the need to take the depositions/conduct discovery, the will contest not having been filed twice when ordered by the court, Mrs. Rashidi not agreeing to mediation until the will contest is filed, Mrs. Rashidi's request that the will contest be waived, Mrs. Calhoun's position that the will contest was filed as part of the amendment, Mrs. Rashidi's position that it is not filed on the proper format, etc. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary and the Petition for Letters of Administration are continued to November 4, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status of mediation and status of the will contest are also set for November 4, 2024.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Will Contest
Off Calendar Jul-22-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Competing Petition For Probate
Off Calendar Jul-22-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Negin Rashidi appeared by zoom for Tree Tam (petitioner).
Robert Hernandez appeared by zoom for Lindsay Bryan (objector).

The court noted that the will contest and the competing petition have not been filed. Mr. Hernandez stated that it was his understanding that the deadline to file is today, that he will be filing a competing petition and a status report on the will contest, and that they have been working informally on discovery. Further discussion was held regarding the need to have a deposition taken, but that party not being available until October. Mrs. Rashidi stated that she does not think discovery is an appropriate reason for Mr. Hernandez to not have filed his documents. Status on filing of a competing petition for probate and status on filing of a will contest are off calendar. The court reminded the parties that the competing petition will be heard on August 19, 2024.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Continued To Aug-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Negin Rashidi appeared by zoom for Tree Tam.
Robert Hernandez for and with Lindsay Morris Bryan (objector) by zoom.

Mrs. Rashidi requested a file by date for Mr. Hernandez to file a proper proceeding to address the will contest. Mr. Hernandez stated that he needs time to present the appropriate petition and that he would like time to conduct some discovery. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to August 19, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of a competing petition for probate, and status on filing of a will contest are set for July 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Said petitions are to be filed by July 22, 2024. If and when these petitions are filed, they are to be given a hearing date of August 19, 2024.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-22-2024 Continued To May-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Negin Rashidi appeared by zoom for Tree Tam (petitioner).
Lindsay Morris Bryan appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mrs. Bryan stated that she was here to contest, that Samuel is her half-brother and that she was not notified. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to May 20, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Bryan is for file her objections in writing on or before May 6, 2024. Mrs. Rashidi is to respond by May 13, 2024. If the objection is not filed timely, the court will find that Mrs. Bryan waived her objections.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
